constraints.name: CoWoS Packaging
constraints.gap: Tight but Groq LPX bypasses it
constraints.note: NVIDIA alone requires ~595K wafers (60% of total). Groq LPX uses zero CoWoS.

constraints.name: HBM Supply
constraints.note: Micron FQ2: $23.9B rev, 75% GM, guiding $33.5B at 81% GM.

constraints.name: Memory Bandwidth
constraints.supply: Rubin: 22 TB/s HBM4 | Groq V3: 150 TB/s SRAM
constraints.note: Memory hierarchy physically realized: HBM4 for training, SRAM for decode, DDR5 for weights.

constraints.name: Datacenter Power
constraints.supply: Grid + fuel cells + SMR (long lead times)
constraints.demand: Rubin: ~2,300W TDP | DSX power mgmt rack
constraints.note: Jensen: $300B annual revenue per GW. NVIDIA shipped DSX power management rack.

constraints.name: Optical / SiPho Capacity
constraints.supply: Lumentum San Jose sold out; Tower SiPho expanding
constraints.note: Spectrum-6 SPX optical rack at GTC. NVIDIA $4B photonic investment.

constraints.name: Inference Token Economics
constraints.note: Three forces compound: reasoning, agentic, physical AI. Dynamo separates prefill/decode.
